detection_signals: Cold soaking always makes wine more colored and tannic
Every red wine must be cold soaked to get good extraction
Cold soaking is the best way to extract tannins
why_incorrect: Cold soaking can increase extraction of certain compounds, but the relationship is not simple. Extraction depends on temperature, duration, pH, grape maturity. Some winemakers achieve excellent color without cold soaking.
misconception: Cold soaking (pre-fermentation maceration at cold temperatures) always extracts more color and tannin from red grape skins.
corrected_understanding: Cold soaking can enhance extraction of color and some tannins, but results vary by grape ripeness, temperature, duration. It is not universally necessary or beneficial.
